name: Infernal Constitution
summary: Fiendish blood runs strong in you, unlocking a resilience akin to that possessed by some fiends. You gain the following benefits:

documentBlocks.text: Fiendish blood runs strong in you, unlocking a resilience akin to that possessed by some fiends. You gain the following benefits:

items: Increase your Constitution score by 1, up to a maximum of 20.
You have resistance to cold damage and poison damage.
You have advantage on saving throws against being poisoned.

abilityIncrease.description: Increase your Constitution score by 1, up to a maximum of 20.

highlights: Increase your Constitution score by 1, up to a maximum of 20.
